Podcast

This weekâs episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, in which Katie and 
I discuss the Knicks, the Jeffrey, hedging sports bets with sports bets, Google 
selling some stock, net equity issuance, taxes on stock vesting, Andrew Left, 
how long you have to be short, the decline of activist short selling and not 
saying dumb stuff in email. You can listen to this weekâs episodehere 
<https://bloom.bg/4nhTnYV>:

You can get Money Stuff: The Podcast <https://bloom.bg/4nhTnYV> at Apple, 
Spotify or wherever you get your podcasts. Weâd love your feedback. You can 
email us atmoneypod@bloomberg.net <mailto:moneypod@bloomberg.net>.

 Podcast
 
 This weekâs episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, in which Katie and I discuss the Knicks, the Jeffrey, hedging sports bets with sports bets, Google selling some stock, net equity issuance, taxes on stock vesting, Andrew Left, how long you have to be short, the decline of activist short selling and not saying dumb stuff in email.
